# Audible Raw Sources

This directory mirrors the raw `View page source` text files from the Audible ReadTheDocs site.

Use [manifest.json](/mnt/cache/scripts/audiobook_importv2/docs/vendor/audible/raw/manifest.json) to see the synced source URLs and local file paths.

Refresh the mirror with:

```bash
/mnt/cache/scripts/audiobook_importv2/.venv/bin/python scripts/sync_audible_raw_docs.py
```
